mood: sunlit internet keepsakes with a recursive bruise
material_language: glossy instant-photo border with flash glare
wax seals and raised adhesive dots
lighting: paper-diffused daylight with one near-camera gloss strike, warm cafe spill along a lower edge, and dark espresso occlusion under overlapping slabs
object_inventory: two large cropped paper fields carrying source-bearing cuts
a cobalt envelope collision with a glossy embedded print
a cream receipt slab floating over a warmer interior shadow
recursive rust-orange cut loops crossing the quiet field
tiny marginal ticks, seals, tabs, and radio-strip notches
negative_constraints: no legible words or readable interface labels inside the image
no desks, dashboards, browser chrome, card grid, archive wall, shelves, cabinets, or room-scale office
do not copy source logos, subjects, page chrome, filenames, or alphanumeric callouts
avoid a perfectly flat overhead stationery scan; require oblique depth, occlusion, crop pressure, and one flash rupture
source anchors must appear as real cuts, seals, apertures, seams, glints, tabs, or embedded grains rather than summary cards
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
